creator: rob@flappie.debank.tv
text:
After the multiple ip for jail update the net/tightvnc software stopped working
	The output of running vncserver is the following:

rob@speeltuin:~>vncserver
vncserver: no free display number on speeltuin.debank.tv.

Fix: 

None yet :-(
How-To-Repeat: 	Upgrade to a recent 7.1-Stable, install net/tightvnc and run vncserver
